text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The day of the Asahi Hai F.S. has arrived. I'm in
the waiting room, when...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Hey, do we still have time? I'm out of tape.
choice_data_list:
Now that you mention it, why do you always put
tape on your nose?

Now that you mention it, why do you always put
tape on your nose?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
I don't feel right without it. Can't even remember
when I started doing it.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, can I go buy some tape? I can probably
just pick some up at a convenience store since
they sell everything.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That's probably true, but Narita Brian has already
changed clothes for the race. She'll definitely
stand out if she goes out like this.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's also not good to waste time with stuff like this
right before a race.
choice_data_list: I'll go buy it for you.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Thanks.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
The quality doesn't matter, just get the cheapest
one.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Just to be sure, I check what brand she usually
uses before heading to the shop nearest to the
racecourse.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The shelves contain a variety of brands, from
well-established standbys to new products
claiming to enhance concentration.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There's even scented tape for relaxation, and
others that stretch.
choice_data_list: I don't know which one to pick...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
What the heck? Did you buy out the whole store
or something?
choice_data_list: ...I'm paying for it, so don't worry about it.
...I'm paying for it, so don't worry about it.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: That's not the point. Geez.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
First of all, a trainer's contract only lasts for three
years from the debut race. And if you don't get
the results, that contract can even be terminated
early.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Yet you're out here wasting money buying stacks
of tape. What are you going to do if I go on a
losing streak and you lose your contract?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Huh?
choice_data_list:
You're going to win, no matter who you're up
against!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Haha... What's with the blind faith? Did you hit
your head or something?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
...Hmph. Well? Which tape is the best for
concentration?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: I'll try that one first.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...It feels okay.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
This is racing. The first across the finish line wins,
right?
choice_data_list:
You're going to win, no matter who you're up
against!

You're going to win, no matter who you're up
against!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Don't try and make me say that.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Okay, fine... Whoever I'm up against, I'm going to
tear them apart—victory will be mine!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
There's a lotta people here. I'd expect nothin' less
of the Asahi Hai Futurity Stakes.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
All right, Brian! Don't bore us out there or I'll
come laugh in your face when you're done!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, the Asahi Hai F.S. is set to begin under
the watchful eyes of a huge crowd.
